name: Basic
titleLine: CLASSIC COMFORT PACKAGE– BASIC DESIGN PLAN( INR 1600 )
highlights: CLASSIC COMFORT PACKAGE– BASIC DESIGN PLAN( INR 1600 )
BACKSPLASH / WALL CLADDING=  CERAMIC TILES ( Easy To Clean , Many Designs Available)
details: CLASSIC COMFORT PACKAGE– BASIC DESIGN PLAN( INR 1600 )
LANTERN HEIGHT  =          9.5 - 10 FEET (FINISHED FLOOR LEVEL TO FLOOR TILES)
STEEL ( TMT Bars)          =            RATHI, RANA , AMBA SHAKTI  or Equivalent Brands( Fe 500 D)
CEMENT= JK SUPER , SHREE, JK CEMENT ( 43 GRADE)
SAND=LOCAL RIVER SAND / ZONE – II SAND
BRICKS                                           =A- GRADE RED CLAY BRICKS(Hand – Molded or local Kilin)
RCC MIX GRADE=M20 RATIO  ( Or As Per Structure Engineer)
PLUMBING FITTING=        CPVC PIPE ( SAGAR , HINDWARE COMPT. BRANDS)
INTERNAL DOOR  =          FLUSH DOOR WITH LAMINATE (30-32 mm)
INTERNAL MAIN DOOR=   FLUSH DOOR WITH VENEER
OUTER MAIN DOOR= MS or MILD STEEL  (Strong , Durable or Rust Resistance)
WINDOW FRAMES=MS PIPE, PPGI JAPANI 1.2 MM , MALAYSIAN , MARANDI
DOOR FRAMES=MS PIPE, PPGI JAPANI 1.2 MM , MALAYSIAN , MARANDI
HARDWARE=            MILD SS HINGES ( Basic fittings)
CABINET( LOWER)=   COMMERCIAL PLY with laminate
SHUTTERS/ FRONT PANELS=   LAMINATE COMMERCIAL PLY ( Glossy , Matte , Texured)
COUNTERTOP MATERIAL=   GRANITE ( Natural Stone , Durable , Heat- Resistant)
BACKSPLASH / WALL CLADDING=  CERAMIC TILES ( Easy To Clean , Many Designs Available)
CABINATE HINGES=  REGULAR HINGES ( OZONE or Compatible Brands )
SINK & ACCESSORIES=  SINGLE BOWL SS 202 GRADE
FAUCET / TAP=  BASIC  Chrome plated Brass
EDGE BAND TAPE (PVC/ABS)=  Matches Laminate Finish
WC ( Toilet Seat)= FLOOR MOUNTED WHITE INDIAN/ WESTERN COMMODE
WASH BASIN= PEDESTAL / TABLE TOP BASIC CERAMIC
TAPS= OEM BRANDS BRASS TAPS WITH CHROME FINISH
BATH SPOUT/ MIXER= NORMAL 2-IN-1 SPOUT MIXTURE
DRAINAGE= REGULAR FLOOR DRAIN WITH SS COVER
VENTILATION= SMALL EXHAUST WINDOW ( 1*1.5 FT ALUMINIUM)
BATHROOM DOORS                                    = WPC or WATERPROOF FLUSH DOORS
WALL PUTTY= SINGLE COAT ( basic white cement-based)
PAINT= 2 COAT OF DISTEMPER PAINT ( Oil – bound or acrylic)
BRANDS= ECONOMY BRANDS ( e.g, Tractor by Asian Paints or Equivalent)
CEILING PAINT= WHITE WASH / BASIC DISTEMPER
PAINT= 2 COAT OF EXTERIOR EMULSION( Economy Range)
COLOR OPTION= WHITE, OFF-WHITE, BEIGE, LIGHT GREY, TERRACOTTA & MORE
LOOK & FEEL= ECONOMICAL , EASY TO CLEAN
MATERIAL= CERAMIC ANTI – SKID FLOOR TILES
SHOWER AREA= SAME AS FLOOR / WALL TILES
SIZE=  AS PER KITCHEN FLOOR SIZE
BENIFITS = EASY TO CLEAN GREASE AND SPILLS
FEATURES= SLIP RESISTANT, EAST TO CLEAN , EASY TO REPLACE
MATERIAL= KOTA STONE / CERAMIC ANTI-SKID TILES
SWITCHES & SOCKETS= MODULAR PLASTIC SWITCHES, STANDARD 6A /16A SOCKETS
WIRING= ISI- MARKED COPPER WIRING ( 1Sqmm -6 Sqmm)
MCB / DISTRIBUTION BOARD= HEAVY MCB BOX
RECOMMENDED BRANDS= ANCHOR ROMA, POLYCAB, FINOLEX, HAVELLS( Basic series)
LIGHTING SINGLE WALL - MOUNTED BULB / TUBE LIGHT ABOVE STAIRCASE
FALSE CEILING ( Fall Ceiling) – DESIGN & MATERIAL DETAILS
DESIGN FLAT / SINGLE-LAYER PLAIN CEILING, Simple Border      Mouldings
LIGHTINGTUBE LIGHT / BULB FITTING, Ceiling  Fan Provision
NOT INCLUDE -1845 ,CEILLING, INTERRIOR, BOREWEEL , COMPOUND WALL
Step 3.   PLOT HANDOVER / SITE PREPARATION / SITE CLEANING5 %
Step 4.   FOUNDATION COMPLETION ( Footings , Columns etc.)10 %

Step 11. WOODEN WORK ( Doors , Wardrobes , Kitchen, etc. )5 %
Step 12.PAINTING , BATHROOM FITTINGS , FINAL TOUCH – UPS9 %
